mapper.sql: select column_id, journal_code, column_name, name_en, parent_id, order_num, need_recommender, usage_scope, is_post_column, file_no_prefix, en_abstract_money, edit_name, column_code, column_type, status, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from publisher_column
mapper.select: where ifnull(journal_code, '') = ifnull(#{journalCode}, '') and ifnull(column_code, '') = ifnull(#{columnCode}, '') limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into publisher_column ( journal_code, column_name, name_en, parent_id, order_num, need_recommender, usage_scope, is_post_column, file_no_prefix, en_abstract_money, edit_name, column_code, column_type, status, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{journalCode}, #{columnName}, #{nameEn}, #{parentId}, #{orderNum}, #{needRecommender}, #{usageScope}, #{isPostColumn}, #{fileNoPrefix}, #{enAbstractMoney}, #{editName}, #{columnCode}, #{columnType}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_column where column_id in
#{columnId}
